name: Daily Lead Generation Machine - Wake Up to Fresh Prospects

parameters.content:
## 🚀 Daily Lead Generation Machine

**What it does:** Every morning at 8 AM, automatically finds up to 100 qualified B2B leads matching your target criteria, filters out invalid emails, saves to Google Sheets, and optionally sends to your outreach tool.

**Input:** Natural language description of your ideal customer profile (ICP)

**Output:** 50-100 enriched leads daily with:
- Full name
- Verified email
- Job title
- Company name
- LinkedIn URL

**Scalability:** Processes up to 100 leads per day, 3000+ per month on autopilot

**Setup:**
1. Get API key from https://linkfinderai.com
2. Replace YOUR_API_KEY_HERE in LinkFinder AI node
3. Edit your target description in 'Define Target ICP' node
4. Connect your Google Sheets (create sheet with columns: Name, Email, Title, Company, LinkedIn, Date)
5. Optional: Connect Lemlist for auto-outreach
6. Activate the workflow

**Services used:** leads_finder_ai

**Perfect for:**
- SDRs who want fresh leads daily
- Founders doing outbound prospecting
- Agencies managing multiple campaigns
- Anyone tired of manual lead sourcing

assignments.name: targetDescription
assignments.value: Head of Marketing in B2B SaaS companies in France with 50-500 employees

assignments.name: summary
assignments.value: ={{ $json.Name ? $json.Name.length : 0 }} new qualified leads added to your sheet!

parameters.content:
## 📧 Optional: Auto-Outreach

Connect this section to automatically send leads to your email tool.

**To enable:**
1. Add Lemlist/Instantly credentials
2. Connect 'Save to Google Sheets' output to Lemlist node
3. Map fields to your campaign

**Recommendation:** Start with Google Sheets only, review leads first, then enable auto-outreach once you trust the quality.

## ⚙️ Configuration Tips

**Target Description Examples:**
- "Head of Marketing in B2B SaaS, France, 50-500 employees"
- "VP Sales at fintech startups in Germany"
- "Founders of AI companies in the US, Series A-B"
- "HR Directors at manufacturing companies, UK"

**Best Practices:**
- Be specific about industry, role, and geography
- Start with 50 leads/day to test quality
- Add company size for better targeting
- Review first batch before scaling up
